lines.en: Azusa
So wonderful, I'm at a loss for words.
Well done~ Good girl, good girl. Fufu
That was quite good, I think. If you
aren't too greedy, it's plenty~ no?
About what you'd expect, I suppose.
Ordinary is best, they say, right?
Um... don't be too discouraged, okay?
Let's do better next time~
Eri-chan, do you have a moment?
Today I'd like to talk about
something I've felt lately
Eri
Okay... what is it?
Well... we've done quite a lot
of lessons together, but...
I feel like I'm running out
of advice to give you
In other words... a rut?
Right. You learn so fast, Eri-chan,
I never repeat a pointer twice
Teaching you was such fun...
The time meant so much to me
But I think using your time
differently now is best for you
D-Do you understand what I mean?
Yeah, more or less...
No matter who you pair up with...
it's bound to happen someday?
Yes. Exactly so
And that's exactly how people
move on to their next step
So, Eri-chan. From now on, shall
we train separately?
Yeah, let's...
All the kindness you've shown me...
I'll never forget it
Fufu, hearing that makes me
very happy
Do your best, Eri-chan.
And take good care of yourself
I'm sure we'll meet again somewhere
...Yeah
It seems Azusa-san has
acknowledged my growth
Her figure I could never copy, but...
everything else... mastered?
I think it's a very good pace.
Keep this up and it's perfect
Now, shall we move along? No need to
match my leisurely pace, you know~?
Oh, that's right... If you like,
would you use this? It's lovely~ Here!
...I'm happy
